product_type: Mobile Column Lift - Tandem Post Configuration
capacity: 18,000 lbs each (with 15" forks) / 16,000 lbs each (with 22" forks)

tire_dimension_fields.dim_w: Fork width at tire end view

installation_requirements.circuit_breaker_recommendation: 1.5 to 2 times the sum of the full load amps for all posts in the system
installation_requirements.final_electrical_connection: Responsibility of the electrical contractor per local/national code
installation_requirements.connection_notes: More than one point of connection may be required. Disconnect switches, main fuses, and main power leads are NOT provided by Mohawk Resources Ltd.

specifications.revision_a: Added dimensions C and D to tire diagram, 11/28/17, G.Gore

features: Tandem post configuration for tandem axle vehicles
Fork width adjustable from 8" min to 30 1/2" max
Lock positions at 3" intervals starting at 12"
Power port on master column only
optional_equipment: #TD-1000-M, Tire Dolly, 1000 lb capacity, Hand Winch
#TD-1000-H, Tire Dolly, 1000 lb capacity, Foot Pump
#TD-1000-A, Tire Dolly, 1000 lb capacity, Air/Hyd
Chassis Contact Lifting Beam (for 2 posts) - Not Tandems
Fork Truck Adapter Kit (for 2 posts) - Not Tandems
Auto Frame Contact Adapter Kit (for 2 posts) - Not Tandems
Wing Plow Adapters (for 2 posts) - Not Tandems
HMMWV (Front to Rear) Adapters (for 2 posts) - Not Tandems
Additional Power Cable (one standard 25' LG cable included per lift)
Longer Power Cable (one standard 25' LG cable included per lift)
Additional Communication Cable (one set of 30' LG cables included per lift)
Longer Communication Cable
Additional Dummy Plug Set (only one set included per lift)
Hand Pendant Control with 25' cord
Slope Indicator (specify quantity of columns)
Wider forks (custom width)
safety_features: Lock positions at 3" intervals starting at 12"
notes: Some options are not compatible - consult Mohawk
Axle weight cannot exceed the capacity of the pair of MP columns selected/specified
After all specifications have been selected and approved by customer (signed), make copy for customer and return signed form to Mohawk
Standard power cable: 25' LG per lift
Standard communication cable: 30' LG per lift (one set)
Revision A: Added dimensions C and D to tire diagram, 11/28/17, G.Gore
Mohawk Resources Ltd., 65 Vrooman Avenue, P.O. Box 110, Amsterdam, NY 12010
